message:
chore(beads): Close EPIC ntm-qhcz - Thundering Herd Prevention complete

Core thundering herd prevention implemented via stagger:
- --stagger flag with 90s default (configurable 0-5m)
- Spawn order awareness (NTM_SPAWN_ORDER, NTM_SPAWN_TOTAL env vars)
- SpawnState dashboard tracking for stagger countdown

Sub-beads closed: ntm-gnqg (stagger flag), ntm-oyxt (soft-claim)
Remaining open: ntm-n50g (orchestrator mode) - P2 alternative enhancement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
